Thanks for contributing! A few quick things before you submit:

- Keep the PR small and focused — milestone-sized changes are easier to review.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r test` passes (176+ tests)

- [ ] If this is a milestone PR: PROGRESS.md updated, git tag planned
